problem: Is dopamine dysregulation cause or effect in schizophrenia — what is primary?
mechanism: Synaptic plasticity modulation via NMDA receptor
hypothesis: Combining Synaptic plasticity modulation via NMDA receptor with current standard of care could unlock function improves by addressing existing therapies only treat symptoms.

experiment.protocol: Optogenetic mouse model with 6 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.
